description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the silex/emacs:27.2-alpine-ci Docker image. Define a single job named pages that runs in the default test stage, executes the exact command `emacs --quick --script publish.el --funcall=ambrevar/publish`, and publishes the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. Configure the job to run only on the `master` branch. No additional services, caches, or variables are required.
